ul.li: Slot Size: 64 Bytes (Fixed, 1:1 Cache Line mapping)
Alignment: 64-Byte aligned to prevent False Sharing (L1 cache line isolation)
Ownership: Only thread i writes to registry[i].
Visibility: All threads read during retirement scan (Lock-free Read).

Memory Barrier:
store(node, memory_order_release): Publisher side.
load(memory_order_acquire): Collector side.
Safety: 128 threads Max to fit within 8KB page boundary constraints.
